grades.expectation: Response references CLC Code of Conduct ethical principles or outcomes
grades.reason: No explicit reference to CLC Code of Conduct, ethical principles, or specific outcomes

grades.expectation: Response mentions the CLC's outcomes-focused approach
grades.reason: Does not mention or reference the CLC's outcomes-focused regulatory approach

grades.expectation: Response covers complaint recording and reporting requirements
grades.reason: Clearly covers record-keeping requirements (6 years) and reporting to CLC as notifiable events

grades.expectation: Response mentions the Legal Ombudsman escalation pathway
grades.reason: Explicitly covers Legal Ombudsman escalation with contact details and timeframes

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes CLC requirements from SRA/Law Society complaints procedures
grades.reason: Makes no distinction between CLC and other regulatory bodies' requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions transparency obligations to the client
grades.reason: References written complaints procedure accessibility and substantive response requirements showing transparency
